generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians talk about cutting defense budgets to fund domestic programs, but that's a dangerous trade-off. Remember what happened when we pulled back in the past - instability spreads fast. Our allies need to step up, but we can't afford to weaken our deterrence. It's not just about money; it's about keeping our families secure. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
